title: Initio Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults, 5 Modes with Smart Timer, 8 Brush Heads & Travel Case Included, Rechargeable Toothbrush, Oral Care Whitening Toothbrush, IT959
description: Initio Electric Toothbrush for adults adopts advanced technology by providing 40,000 high-speed vibrations per minute and effectively removing all teeth stains! The rechargeable electric toothbrush's built-in timer automatically shuts off in 2 minutes and pauses every 30 seconds to allow for ample brushing time and habits. 5 High-Performance-Brushing modes are available to meet different oral needs. Brush in the shower as this unit is waterproof up to IPX7 standard. Initio Electric Toothbrush for adults provides 8 famous DuPont brush heads for over 2 years of using. Each brush head comes with a protective cover to keep it clean and hygienic! Lastly, we provide you with a one-year warranty against any defects or issues you may have with the electric toothbrush. It can be your choice for Christmas, New Year Mother's Day and Valentine's Day gifts.
features: 40,000 STROKES PER MINUTE & 5 BRUSHING MODES - Initio rechargeable electric toothbrush for adults with advanced technology provides 40,000 high-speed vibrations per minute to effectively remove stains! 5 High-Performance electric toothbrush modes (whitening, cleaning, polishing, massaging, sensitivity) to meet your varied oral needs and are suitable for any brushing purpose. Recommend sensitivity mode for kids.

2 MINUTES SMART TIMER & LONG LASTING BATTERY LIFE - This electric toothbrush built-in Timer with 2 minutes- auto shut-off and interval pausing every 30 seconds encourages a proper brushing habit. The rechargeable electric toothbrush for adults is powered by a safe and durable lithium battery that can last up to 45 days of brushing on a single full charge. With Initio electric toothbrush never worry about bringing your charger when you travel!

8 DUPONT BRUSH HEADS & TRAVEL CASE INCLUDE- Initio Electric Toothbrush for adults provides 8 DuPont brush heads for over 2 years of using. Each electric toothbrush head comes with a protective cover to keep it clean and hygienic! And the quality-made travel case is ideal for any trip and enable you to easily transport your electric toothbrush and brush heads wherever you go. A best choice for your home and travel!

LIGHTWEIGHT HANDLE DESIGN AND CONVENIENT CHARGING -The electric toothbrush is easy to hold and made with anti-slip material. The electric toothbrush can be charged anytime and anywhere with a USB cable. Plus, this electric toothbrush has a low battery indicator and auto shut off when the unit is fully charged to prevent battery from being overcharged and damaged. Please kindly know that the package DO NOT include the AC Adaptor.

IPX7 WATERPROOF - This electric toothbrush is a water-resistant unit up to IPX7 standard. The entire toothbrush can be safely rinsed with water. You may also safely brush with it in the bath or shower. Initio sonic electric toothbrush is also a perfect Valentine's Day gift.

features: Portable Electric Toothbrush With Case: Our battery operated toothbrush for adults and kids keeps your mouth fresh all day. This kit includes 1 x soft bristle electric toothbrush handle, 2 x Brush Heads with Nylon Bristles, 1 x Toothbrush Case, One AAA Battery, & Instruction Manual.

Gives Perfect Strokes: Our tooth brushes for teeth electric feature 2 speeds (to control your cleaning) with vibrations from 18,000 to 24,000 brush strokes per minute. These electric travel toothbrushes contain an easy-to-use on / off switch.

Styling Carrying Case: This portable toothbrush electric comes with its own carrying case making travel toothbrushes ideal for on-the-go oral care. The stylish electric toothbrush carrying case protects from unclean surfaces and avoids spillage from a wet toothbrush after use.

Great for Kids Too: With our whitening toothbrush, handy carrying case, and selection of bright colors, kids will love the Go Plus Sonic Toothbrush. Perfectly sized electric toothbrush for kids 8-12 or above that fits smaller hands for younger, more sensitive mouths.

Durable, Develop Healthy Brushing Habits: These oral hygiene products are programmed with a quadrant pacer and a 2-minute timer. Our travel electric toothbrushes for adults and kids are made with high-quality and long-lasting DuPont nylon bristles for longer life.

This toothbrush was perfect to take with me on my last trip as it is small, lightweight, sleek with the rose gold design, and comes with a really nice and compact case. Another huge plus is that it is really very quiet when it is on, so you don't risk having to wake others up. It is a great choice for a travel toothbrush.

title: PerioSciences White Care Oral Care Kit - Toothpaste, Mouthwash, Gel
features: For your oral health -​​ PerioSciences Whitening Oral Care System is a three-product system for daily use by individuals who undergo peroxide-based professional whitening or strips. The product trio can make teeth even brighter, soothe soft tissue, and restore pH balance in the mouth.

Natural ingredients - This dental care kit is made using our signature antioxidants and botanicals such as Phloretin, perilla seed extract, and hesperetin. The whitening toothpaste contains plasdone along with grapefruit seed extracts and micro-minerals to gently polish and thoroughly cleanse surface stains while removing unhealthy build-up.

Dentist recommended - PerioSciences has worked with dentists for over 10 years to perfect our formula containing scientifically proven ingredients that focus on the mouth's natural defense system. Our products are recommended and used by over 1000 dentists nationwide.

Easy to use - Brush teeth with AO ProToothpaste. Rinse with 1 tsp of AO ProRinse for up to 1 minute then spit out. Apply a pea-sized amount of AO ProVantage Gel to gums using a fingertip or cotton swab, let gel dissolve, then spit out. Do not eat or drink for 30 minutes after application.

Redefining Oral Care with Antioxidants - PerioSciences believes in harnessing the power of nature using antioxidants and science in a novel dual approach by using ingredients known to have properties that keep your oral health and your smile at its best.

reviews.title: Great

reviews.title: It is recommended by my dentist!
reviews.text: Use it daily and keeps my oral implants clean and healthy!

reviews.title: cleans my teeth well
reviews.text: Love this set, it cleans and freshens my breath.  My teeth feel cleaner longer than with regular toothpaste.  My breath stays fresh all day.  the mouthwash does not burn and the paste is gel like and it does not taste good or bad.

reviews.title: Synergistic formulation
reviews.text:
Excellent at controlling bad breath.
Especially for those of us who have a dry mouth, be it through illness or medications, I can tell you that this product is excellent and that area.
I used it during a time when I also had some mouth irritation. I feel that it helped to heal without any sting.

reviews.title: great set of premium oral care products
reviews.text: It seems like a lot of oral care companies are now going more high end, as I am starting to see toothpaste for over $10 when you can get "normal" toothpaste at the drugstore for $1-$2 (with a coupon). I was drawn to this because it is fluoride free. The toothpaste is nice and minty fresh, my mouth felt clean and fresh afterwards. I know that the brownish colored toothpaste may bother some people but I have used herbal toothpaste before so no color is "weird" or off limits for me - as long as they taste fine. There's even a few brands out there that has black colored paste! I really like the mouthwash as well and I'm surprised it is alcohol free because I feel like it does as good of a job as an alcohol one that I just recently purchased - minus the burn. My mouth just smelled and felt amazing after using both. I wasn't as fond of the dental gel as I found it useless and not something I would want to use much of. Overall this is a very nice set of oral care products and I would highly recommend the toothpaste and the mouth wash. I personally would repurchase the toothpaste and mouthwash - I hope they have a set with just those two items.

reviews.title: Lightweight brush that packs a punch
reviews.text:
What I like:

-lightweight and compact in size
-only one button to cycle through modes and turn it off
-comes with (3) brush heads
-includes USB power cord
-will fit in my toothbrush holder

What I don't like:

-need to buy power adapter to charge it

This isn't a fancy sonic toothbrush. If you're looking for a basic electric toothbrush that's a step above the type you'd buy at the grocery store (that takes two AA batteries - you know the one), this will do it. The toothbrush cleaned my teeth well with a good amount of vibration of the bristles. I'm pretty pleased.

reviews.title: Compact Head
reviews.text: I like these better than the G3 brushes because they have a compact head. Great for gum health and they can get into tight spaces to clean your teeth better.

reviews.title: Indeed my gums improved after switching to this type brush head.
reviews.text:
There is a truth which dentists will tell you but is not widely discussed otherwise: Too much, too vigorous tooth brushing, and brushing with too stiff bristles will possibly damage the gums. Having said this, my dental hygienist is the one who broke the news to me that gums were starting to recede. She suggested a softer brush head for my Sonicare and to never supplement with hand brushing if the electric brush is available.

These brush heads fit the newer models of Philips Sonicare but I don't know about older models. They are listed as G2 and, compared to the more commonly found S2 brush heads, are less worrisome to use. Indeed there was significant gum healing since the checkup where the hygienist had warned me. So I'm hoping to continue to use them.

This review is unsolicited and uncompensated.

title: Oral-B Pulsar Battery Toothbrush With Charcoal Infused Bristles, Soft
description: Oral B Pulsar charcoal infused toothbrush is battery operated to gently vibrate and polish away stains for a whiter, cleaner smile. Using the same technique to brush as a manual toothbrush, The bristles vibrate providing a gentle massaging and polishing action while brushing. The bristles penetrate between teeth where stain build-up often begins. Pulsar has soft vibrating bristles that help break up plaque between teeth. Plus, the split head design moderates the amount of pressure applied to your teeth and gums. Contouring to your unique smile, The Pulsar toothbrush will leave your smile bright and clean with every use.

reviews.title: Hello OralB
reviews.text: It’s an Oral-B.  I prefer this brand and hopped on the charcoal type at the advice of my former dentist.  She recommended.

reviews.title: Weak vibration

reviews.title: Great Product!
reviews.text: Great Product!

reviews.title: Great toothbrush!
reviews.text: I always use the Oral B battery toothbrushes - I’m over 80, with my original teeth, and this toothbrush has kept me in good shape for years.  I like that they remind me to get a new about every three months.  The charcoal one helps to keep my teeth as white as they can be at this age - no taste involved - just mixes with your toothpaste and it does a great job.  I also find that this toothbrush brushes my gums, too, and I have not had any bleeding gums in years.  This is the only toothbrush I will buy.

reviews.title: Clean Those Teeth
reviews.text:
I love this electric tooth brush, by Oral-B as it is so different from ones I have tried before. I thought I would have to insert the battery but to my surprise it was already inserted and ready to be used. It was so easy and the button you need to push is clearly marked with a + so you push that and you are ready to add toothpaste and brush away. Just push the – sign and it stops. That was so easy and fast and you got a good brushing of your teeth. The bristles are charcoal infused bristle and this adds to completely clean your teeth and makes them feel clean.

I am wondering what one has to do if battery is used up as could not figure out where to change a battery. There was not that much explanations but I am enjoying the use of this great Oral-B for a great battery tooth brush. Great way to start the day with an Oral-B electric tooth cleaning.

title: CORATED Toddler Toothbrush U-Shaped Kids Toothbrush Baby Soft Silicone Toothbrush Manual Training Toothbrush Infant 360° Oral Teeth Cleaning Design for Kids 2-7 Years Old (Doughnut Brown)
features: 【SAFETY MATERIAL】Different from ordinary toothbrushes, U-shaped toothbrushes use safe food-grade silicone material, which is soft and comfortable, has no peculiar smell, and without BPA. Mothers are more at ease to protect the baby's oral health.

【360° EFFECTIVE CLEANING】The unique U-shaped toothbrush head design is more suitable for Toddler's tooth structure. It fits each tooth perfectly and provides adequate cleaning and protection for your child's teeth.

【FUN&CUTE TOOTHBRUSH】The cute rainbow and doughnut patterns, and the creative U-shaped toothbrush make it easy and fun for children to brush their teeth. This helps your child be willing to brush their teeth longer and even develop healthy brushing habits, say goodbye to tooth decay.

【EXTRA SOFT TOOTHBRUSH】The silicone bristles is soft on children's teeth and gums, clean teeth gently and massage baby’s delicate gums. The Soft brush head help get into hard to reach areas and effectively and remove stains.

【EASY TO USE】Squeeze toothpaste on the both side of the baby's toothbrush and put the kids toothbrush into baby's mouth, Swing it left to right, in 60 seconds finished the brushing. This package comes with 1 silicone toothbrush and 1 replacement silicone brush head, it is recommended to replace the brush head every 1 month. Toothbrush size: 85mm/3.35", Brush head size: 1.96"*0.98". Specially designed for the teeth of toddlers aged 2-7.

reviews.title: Nifty toothbrush, brush all the teeth at once
reviews.text:
Just add toothpaste, stick in mouth and brush side to side. Gets all the teeth clean at the same time. Very nifty. The brush head is a little flexible, so it can adjust to her jaw shape. I think the only thing that concerns me is that this is not really teaching the kid how to brush with a regular toothbrush. For now, it's really useful since she gets impatient with brushing teeth.
It came with a spare brush head which just pops on to the small metal rod. It's also very cute.

reviews.title: Simple and easy to use
reviews.text: This little toothbrush is pretty cheap in comparison to others similar to it, but it also doesn’t have any special functions. It just works as is, you put tooth paste between the bristles and then it’s used manually. No vibrations or flashing colors, but it does have a super cute design and hey at least it doesn’t need to be charged because those cords always seem to get lost too lol. Great price point for a bit more of a detailed, deep clean for kiddos’ teeth. Recommend!

title: Oral-B iO Series 4 Electric Toothbrush with (1) Brush Head, Rechargeable, Black
description: The iO is Oral-B’s best technology: Clinically Proven 500% More Plaque Removal Along Gumline versus a manual toothbrush. The i04 coaches you to a perfect clean. This is real time personalized coaching. The accompanying App shows your daily brushing report. Having 4 Brush Modes (Daily Clean, Whiten, Sensitive, and Super Sensitive) Oral-B is on your team for your everyday brushing task. A Round head and gentle micro-vibrations, the Magnetic interaction delivers smooth, harmonious motion through a Synchronized cleaning action (micro-vibrations synced with oscillations). A Built-in-2-Minute Timer ensures an even easier experience, helping you get an optimal clean on all your teeth. The Oral-B's quadrant timer breaks the two minutes up into four 30-second intervals to clean each quadrant of your mouth; we keep the time, so you don’t have to. Delivering the perfect pressure is done by having a Pressure Sensor. The Pressure Sensor Indicates optimal cleaning pressure and warns of over pressure. With an accompanying travel case, you’ll have a fresh clean everywhere you go. We’re with you on your next trip or even your mid-day on-the go brushing! Best of all, it is brought to you by Oral-B—the #1 brand used by dentists worldwide.* *Based on surveys of a representative worldwide sample of dentists carried out for P&G regularly.Do not use on children under age 3. Replace brush (head) every 3 months or sooner if brush head becomes worn.

title: Philips Sonicare 4100 Electric Rechargeable Power Toothbrush, Black, with Genuine Optimal Plaque Control Replacement Toothbrush Heads, White, 3 Pack
description: Remove plaque and experience a deep, effective clean with Sonicare technology, removing up to 5x-7x more plaque vs. a manual toothbrush. Sonicare technology gently pulses water between your teeth, for a month's worth of manual brushing in just 2 minutes. The QuadPacer lets you know when you've spent the optimal amount of time on each section of your mouth while the SmarTimer signals when your 2 minutes is up. The pressure sensor flashes red to remind you to ease off, helping to prevent gum recession, while the 2 intensity settings ensure a comfortable clean that’s right for you. Going electric might feel like a big step, but with this brush you’re in safe hands. Its slim ergonomic design and familiar-shaped head gives you everything you need for an effective clean. The kit includes 1 Philips Sonicare 4100 electric toothbrush, 1 Optimal Plaque Control (C2) brush head and 1 USB charger (wall adaptor not included). An additional 3 pack of Optimal Plaque Control (C2) brush heads included.

reviews.title: Edit: Good for my 2 year old
reviews.text:
I realize it says it's a kids toothbrush but it's huge! It's bigger than a regular sized brush for adults. I intended this for my 2 year old for Christmas. It's my fault for not looking at details. I've been searching for an Olaf one and this was on sale. I have not tried it but will update when we do...

Update: I gave this to my daughter early because she saw Olaf. It does fit in her mouth and the on/off buttons are easy for her to push. It's her favorite color, purple. She actually brushes her teeth. Well the toothbrush does the work! I don't see a timer on it. So far, the battery is doing fine. My biggest concern is replacing the head. It's already looking like I should replace.

reviews.title: Three Stars
reviews.text: The handle is kinda weird to hold onto.

reviews.title: the Artists' (Tooth) Brush
reviews.text:
these tooth brushes are so pretty. the heads are dwarfed by the handles, but the heads are the perfect size for my mouth and the handles are the perfect size for my hands, so no complaints. been using one for the last two days, with charcoal toothpaste and tooth powder. the black bristles make it a bit harder to see when the brush is totally cleaned after brushing, but not so much that it's a problem.

the bristles are great and leave my mouth feeling squeaky clean, but I wish the heads were replaceable because the carved handles are amazing. extremely comfortable, too. I'll definitely start a collection as the bristles die, then (after sawing off the heads) sand them down and use them for something decorative. they're far too pretty to toss in the garbage.

ever since discovering bamboo fabrics a couple of years ago I've been on a bamboo kick for any and everything possible. it's long been one of my favorite plants (and the first thing I planted here at my home), and that it's sustainable/environmentally friendly has made it my go-to. hadn't even considered that there might be toothbrushes made of bamboo, but the minute I saw them I grabbed them. HIGHly recommended. bamboo is the wave of the future!

reviews.title: I am one of those people that can't stand the ...
reviews.text: I am one of those people that can't stand the feel of soft bristled toothbrushes.  I am therefore stuck looking all over to find one of the medium bristled ones.  I have finally found one that feels right and leaves my teeth feeling clean without making my gums bleed.

reviews.title: Clean away
reviews.text: brushes my teeth every day. deserves 5*

reviews.title: Good delivery but poore choice by the packager
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. I often use this brand and style it holds up very well, however I did not like the fact that they sent a guy a pink toothbrush.

reviews.title: Very good travel toothbrush when your sonic is at home.
reviews.text: or when the rest of the family is asleep and you don't want the noisy electric brush to wake them up. The thick handle and light weight is ideal for the elderly or those with arthritis making a tight grip harder to do. I like the medium brush better than the soft bristle, with the medium you don't have to brush as hard for clean teeth and as long as you aren't grinding the bristles into your mouth your gums should not become stressed. With the soft bristle, while ideal for gums, my teeth don't feel as clean.

reviews.title: Polishing star takes some getting used to
reviews.text:
I'm not sure the polishing star is really more effective than normal bristles if you do a good job of brushinganyway, and it is a but squeaky on my teeth and can rub the gums the wrong way if you are careless in brushing.

That said, the medium bristles are effective and not too hard, and I did like the head size, handle grip and overall effectiveness.
